Class SimsNeedsTracker

java.lang.Object
simcli.needs.SimsNeedsTracker
public class SimsNeedsTracker extends Object
Centralised tracker for all five Sim needs (Hunger, Energy, Hygiene, Happiness, Social), health, and the resulting SimState.

Each tick, all needs decay based on the Sim's current activity, cross-penalties are applied (e.g. low hygiene reduces social), and health is drained or regenerated depending on hunger level.

  • Constructor Details

    • SimsNeedsTracker

      public SimsNeedsTracker()

  • Method Details

    • tick

      public void tick(Sim sim, double ageMultiplier, double stageEnergyModifier, String simName)
      Processes one simulation tick: decays all needs, applies cross-penalties between needs, drains or regenerates health, and updates the SimState.
      Parameters:
      sim - the Sim whose needs are being tracked.
      ageMultiplier - age-based decay modifier (older Sims decay faster).
      stageEnergyModifier - life-stage energy decay modifier.
      simName - display name for warning log messages.

    • updateState

      public void updateState()
      Resolves value thresholds into strict Enum definitions sequentially. Death now only occurs when health reaches 0, not from any single need.

    • increaseSocial

      public void increaseSocial(int amount)

    • decreaseEnergy

      public void decreaseEnergy(int amount)
      Decreases the Sim's energy by the given amount.
      Parameters:
      amount - the energy points to drain.
